failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.full_name,
  p.num_followers
FROM profile p
WHERE (
  p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'italian & (restaurante | restaurant | trattoria | pasta | pizza) & "são paulo"')
  OR p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'italiano & (restaurante | trattoria | pasta | pizza) & "são paulo"')
)
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.full_name,
  p.num_followers
FROM profile p
WHERE 
  p.biography_lexemes @@ websearch_to_tsquery('portuguese', 'restaurante italiano "são paulo"')
  OR p.biography_lexemes @@ websearch_to_tsquery('english', 'italian restaurant "sao paulo"')
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
